channel.title: Epilog
channel.description: Updates for the Epilog macOS app

item.title: Epilog 0.9
item.description:
What's New

  • Entry Editor: press Up button to reuse prior entries
  • Epilog on macOS can now look for and install updates — on by default, opt out in Settings → General
  • A Download button will show when updates are available
  • Sign in with Apple or Google added

Bug Fixes

  • Tint colors
  • Various layouts
  • Various fixes in the iPhone & iPad apps
